name: brimba
description: Brimba — the multi-tenant SaaS base by Swift Struck. web/ = screens, workers/ = the brains, shared/ = types both sides agree on.

scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=brimba-auth && npm run test --workspace=brimba-tenancy && npm run test --workspace=brimba-realtime
scripts.check: npx tsc --noEmit -p web && npx tsc --noEmit -p workers/auth && npx tsc --noEmit -p workers/tenancy && npx tsc --noEmit -p workers/realtime && npx tsc --noEmit -p workers/gateway && npm test
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && npm run deploy:staging --workspace=brimba-auth && npm run deploy:staging --workspace=brimba-realtime && npm run deploy:staging --workspace=brimba-tenancy && npm run deploy:staging --workspace=brimba-gateway && npm run smoke:staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && npm run deploy:production --workspace=brimba-auth && npm run deploy:production --workspace=brimba-realtime && npm run deploy:production --workspace=brimba-tenancy && npm run deploy:production --workspace=brimba-gateway
